prompt:
Primary request: Use case: logo-brand
Asset type: Chrome extension app icon and brand mark for LinguaStream
Primary request: create a polished icon mark for a YouTube video translator extension that transcribes English speech, translates to Chinese, and speaks the translated timeline in sync with playback
Subject: abstract flowing language stream forming a subtle play triangle and voice waveform, with two short subtitle-line shapes suggesting bilingual captions
Style/medium: vector-friendly modern app icon, clean geometric shapes, premium software branding, no realistic scene
Composition/framing: centered mark inside a rounded square app tile, strong silhouette, readable at 16px and 128px
Lighting/mood: calm, precise, helpful, lightweight
Color palette: fresh jade green and teal with a small warm orange accent, off-white highlights, matching a clean light UI
Materials/textures: flat-to-subtle-depth digital gradient, crisp edges, minimal shadow
Quality: high
Text: none
Constraints: no letters, no words, no watermark, no people, no flags, no YouTube logo, no Google logo, no microphone hardware icon; must feel original and simple; square icon
revised_prompts: Create a polished square app icon and brand mark for a Chrome extension called LinguaStream, logo-brand use case. Design a centered abstract symbol inside a rounded square app tile. The symbol should suggest a flowing language stream that subtly forms both a play triangle and a voice waveform, plus two short subtitle-line shapes hinting at bilingual captions. Style: vector-friendly modern app icon, clean geometric forms, premium software branding, original and simple, no realistic scene. Composition: strong silhouette, highly legible at 16px and 128px, balanced negative space, centered. Mood: calm, precise, helpful, lightweight. Color palette: fresh jade green and teal with a small warm orange accent, off-white highlights, suitable for a clean light UI. Texture/materials: flat to subtle-depth digital gradient, crisp edges, minimal shadow. Constraints: no text, no letters, no words, no watermark, no people, no flags, no YouTube logo, no Google logo, no microphone hardware icon. High quality, square icon.
